CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Feb-15-2024 Off Calendar

CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Dec-04-2023 Continued To Mar-12-24 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion & Motion For Attorneys' Fees, Costs And Expenses
Off Calendar Nov-13-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances (via Zoom):

Marisa Melero, Esq., of KNIGHT LAW GROUP, LLP, (310) 552-2250, for Plaintiff.
Stephen H. Dye, Esq., of MORTENSON TAGGART ADAMS LLP, (949) 774-2224, for Defendants.

RE: Plaintiff's Motion For Attorneys' Fees, Costs And Expenses.

Ruling is argued. At conclusion of argument, the court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: Plaintiffs' motion for attorney fees and costs in this lemon law case is granted in the amounts of $60,856 (fees) and $4,041 (costs). Based on (1) 36 years' experience with legal fees and costs in the San Francisco Bay Area legal market, (2) having ruled on more than a dozen lemon law fee motions and (3) the facts of this case, the requested $46,812 is a reasonable loadstar. Plaintiffs' counsel say they took the case on contingency and settled it for almost twice what their clients paid for the vehicle. These factors merit a .3 lodestar enhancement. Defendants' opposition does not dispute the $4,041 in costs.

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the tentative ruling and in compliance with CRC 3.1312.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer. Clerk: Robert Woods. Court Reporter: Katie Thidodeaux, T: 818.6408953, E: ktbdx@aol.com. (302/RBU)

Plaintiffs' motion is granted in part.
